events.event_description: Embassy Kuwait established, with Chargé d'Affaires Dayton S. Mak in charge.

evidence.quote: Embassy Kuwait was established on September 22, 1961, with Mak in charge.

events.event_description: Embassy Kuwait effectively closed after Iraqi occupation of Kuwait; Ambassador Howell and Embassy staff departed.

evidence.quote: Iraqi armed forces occupied Kuwait 1990-08-02. Note: Howell and the Embassy staff left Kuwait on December 13, 1990.

events.event_description: Embassy Kuwait reopened following liberation of Kuwait.

evidence.quote: Embassy Kuwait was reopened on March 1, 1991.
